title: Dr. Evert Jean Jacques van der Horst: Bridging East and West in Medical Care
description: BUSINESS NEWS - With more than five decades...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - With more than five decades of medical experience, Dr. Evert Jean Jacques van der Horst has become a respected name in both conventional and alternative healthcare.


> Practising from George in the Western Cape, he is not only a seasoned general practitioner but also a trained expert in traditional Chinese medicine, including acupuncture—making his approach to healing truly holistic.


Dr. van der Horst holds qualifications from the University of Pretoria, as well as advanced training in clinical pharmacology and Chinese medicine through international institutions, including studies in Lanzhou, China.

Over the years, he has worked with leading research groups across South Africa, Europe, China, and the USA, with a strong focus on pharmaceutical development, statistical medicine, and drug safety.

His passion for education and medical advancement has earned him several honorary titles, including Honorary Senior Lecturer at MEDUNSA and Honorary District Surgeon in Johannesburg.

He has also authored numerous reference works and health guides in both pharmacology and traditional medicine, and continues to contribute to the academic and professional training of healthcare practitioners.

What truly sets Dr. van der Horst apart is his unique, integrated approach to healthcare. His George-based practice offers general medical consultations, pharmacological advice, and alternative therapies such as acupuncture and herbal treatments. Patients benefit from a tailored treatment plan that draws on both Western science and Eastern wisdom.

Recognised internationally, Dr. van der Horst is a Life Member of Zheng’s Acupuncture Research Group and a researcher with the Hong Kong Traditional Medicine Chamber. His involvement in shaping the curriculum and assessment for Chinese medicine practitioners in South Africa highlights his commitment to maintaining high standards in the field.

Beyond accolades and publications, Dr. van der Horst remains grounded in his core mission: to improve lives. “Medicine is not just about treating symptoms,” he says. “It’s about seeing the person as a whole and creating a treatment plan that addresses their physical, emotional, and even cultural needs.”

His advice to prospective patients? “Come prepared—bring your questions, your medical history, and an open mind. My aim is to make your healthcare journey as effective, safe, and supportive as possible.”

Dr. van der Horst continues to serve the George community with empathy, wisdom, and a wealth of knowledge earned over a lifetime of healing.

For more information follow us on Facebook.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
